reasoning: The control IA-5(6) focuses on the protection of authenticators, which in Kubernetes can be mapped to the protection of sensitive data such as secrets and service account tokens. Ensuring secrets are encrypted at rest and service account tokens are not automatically mounted helps protect these authenticators. Additionally, enabling authentication on the API server and encrypting etcd data are critical for protecting access credentials and sensitive data within the cluster.
title: Authenticator Management - Authenticator management | protection of authenticators protect authenticators c
